schema_version.description: Version of the CLI JSON output contract.

subcommand.description: CLI subcommand that produced this object.

endpoint.description: Provider or broker endpoint used for the chat request.

status.description: HTTP status code returned by the provider or broker.

text.description: Assistant text returned by the provider.

receipt.description: Receipt artifact written by `vi chat`; absent for `--no-receipt`.

path.description: Path where the VIRC receipt envelope was written.

size_bytes.description: Size of the written receipt envelope in bytes.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings emitted during chat or receipt parsing.
